message:
Add "Rust Port" project category with orange accent theme

Introduce a new project classification for Rust ports of popular
libraries to distinguish them from general OSS contributions.

Changes:
- Add "rust-port" to Project type union in lib/content.ts
- Reclassify 4 projects as rust-port: FastMCP Rust, Charmed Rust,
  Rich Rust, and OpenTUI Rust
- Add Rust Ports filter with Repeat icon to projects listing page
- Implement orange styling for rust-port cards (text-orange-400,
  bg-orange-500/10, ring-orange-500/20) and detail pages
- Include rust-port projects in Schema.org software application
  metadata for SEO

The orange color choice aligns with Rust branding. The Repeat icon
symbolizes porting/translation between languages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
